title: medicago sativa var. glutinosa
intro: Medicago sativa var. glutinosa, also known as lucerne or sweet clover, is a perennial legume plant that is widely cultivated for its medicinal and nutritional properties. The plant contains isoflavones, particularly formononetin and biochanin A, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Consuming lucerne has been associated with various health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health, enhanced bone density, and reduced risk of certain cancers. Lucerne can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
